description: Share revenue numbers and product metrics publicly on Twitter to build trust and organic following
notes: Requires consistent posting for months. Compounding effect.

description: Build 3-5 products targeting the same audience to maximize LTV per follower
notes: Cross-sell existing audience. Digital nomads buy NomadList + RemoteOK + PhotoAI.

description: Use Twitter/X as primary marketing channel with zero ad spend. Controversial takes + memes drive engagement
notes: Requires 2+ years of consistent content before meaningful following.

description: When new AI API launches build better UI in 24-48 hours. TypingMind built in 1 day = $500K year 1
notes: Time-sensitive arbitrage. Must monitor API launches daily. Biggest single tactic.

description: $39-129 one-time purchases instead of subscriptions. Lower friction = higher volume. 20K+ customers
notes: Works best for tools with low marginal cost. No recurring revenue downside.

description: Build multiple small products ($5-10K/mo each) instead of one big SaaS. Diversification + multiple shots on goal
notes: Marc Lou and Tony both prove this. 30 apps > 1 app approach.

description: Launch on Product Hunt with viral video. 13 of 21 launches hit #1 Product of Day. $6K in first 48 hours
notes: Repeatable launch channel. Requires Product Hunt community engagement.

description: Build free micro-tools that drive traffic to paid products. LogoFast = 50K logos = $5K ShipFast referrals
notes: Requires building useful free tools. High effort but compounds.

description: Transition from SaaS to info products (courses). CodeFast launched Nov 2024 = $92K in 48 hours. 10x easier to sell than SaaS
notes: Biggest ROI tactic. Build products THEN sell the how-to-build course. Marc proved this.

description: Generate 200+ location-based pages to rank for long-tail keywords. Ranked top 10 for professional headshots
notes: One-time effort creates hundreds of ranking pages. HeadshotPro blueprint.

description: Build affiliate program generating $50K+/mo. 15%+ of total revenue from affiliates promoting your product
notes: Passive revenue channel. Partners do the marketing. Backlinks boost SEO.

description: Acquire smaller competing products (Dreamchanted Hesti AI) to funnel their traffic to main product
notes: Requires capital and deal flow. Not Day 1 tactic.

description: Kling + Nano Banana + Fastmoss + Captions app = 300+ TikTok videos/day. Replaces $50K+/mo creative budget
notes: Production-ready tactic. $300/mo for content that would cost $50K+ manually.

description: Build database of 14K-27K TikTok Shop creators who sell profitably. Average $36K/mo GMV per creator
notes: Network takes time to build. Start with 50-100 creators then scale.

description: Free podcast -> newsletter (100K+ subs) -> SaaS product -> high-ticket workshop ($5375). Full ascension model
notes: Proven pipeline. Takes 6+ months to build audience but then prints money.

description: Build tool that generates startup ideas (your audience's core need). Tool IS the marketing for your studio
notes: Tool must solve actual problem for target audience. Not just a demo.

description: $0 (free course) -> $350 (Ship 30) -> $6800 (PGA). Each tier filters for more serious buyers. PGA = $6.8M from 1000 students
notes: Most profitable model. 1000 students x $6800 = $6.8M. Apply to any expertise.

description: 30-day writing challenge creates community + accountability + results. 10000+ graduates = testimonial engine
notes: Works for any skill. 30-day challenge + community + weekly calls.

description: B2B podcast = demand gen + content engine + relationship builder. Every episode = multiple content pieces
notes: Best B2B demand gen channel according to Cody. Warms leads before cold email.

description: Use Drafthorse AI to write 100 articles in 2 minutes. Low-competition long-tail keywords rank immediately
notes: Flips niche site economics. Content so cheap you can go after ALL long tail.

description: TikTok drove 70% of Praycreen installs. Short demo videos showing app in action. Meta ads at $0.39/install
notes: Praycreen = PrayerLock validation. Exact same concept proved $120K ARR.

description: Build niche app -> grow to $10K+/mo -> sell for 2-4x annual revenue. Lotanna sold 4 apps
notes: Requires building to meaningful revenue first. Exit channel = MicroAcquire or Twitter.

description: Monitor 200+ competitor pages with Visualping.io. Get alerts when anything changes. Undercut before they react
notes: Instant implementation. Works for any competitive market.

description: Hook tweet -> self-reply with deeper content -> final reply = product CTA. 3 things: algorithm signal replies boost 10x and lead qualification and distribution
notes: Zero-cost tactic. Immediately implementable. Every post should use this.

description: Every product page links to all other products in footer. 15% follower-to-customer conversion for ShipFast
notes: Simple implementation. One-time setup on all product pages.
